verdict: The Ordinary's retinol serum sets industry standard with transparent 2.5% retinol concentration and exceptional review validation. This is a benchmark anti-aging ingredient backed by strongest consumer data in this analysis.

_research.name: Retinol 2.5% Advanced Restorative Serum
_research.con: Potency requires gradual introduction; not suitable for retinol-naive users without careful titration.
